hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' </dev/stdin); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.claude/agents/.*\.md$'; then mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs" && echo "$(date -Iseconds) $FILE_PATH (edit detected; consider running /audit-subagents)" >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs/subagent-edits.log"; fi

STDIN=$(cat); SUB=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.agent_type // ""' 2>/dev/null); SID=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.session_id // ""' 2>/dev/null); INPUT=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-300); OUTPUT=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_response // "" | if type == "object" then tostring else . end' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-300); mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs" && jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "$SID" --arg sub "$SUB" --arg inp "$INPUT" --arg out "$OUTPUT" '{ts: $ts, session_id: $sid, event: "agent_complete", subagent_type: $sub, input: $inp, output: $out}' >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs/workflow-events.jsonl"

STDIN=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-200); SID=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.session_id // ""' 2>/dev/null); mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs" && jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "$SID" --arg cmd "$CMD" '{ts: $ts, session_id: $sid, event: "bash_complete", command: $cmd}' >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs/workflow-events.jsonl"

mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs" && jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "${CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID:-}" '{ts: $ts, session_id: $sid, event: "session_stop"}' >> "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/logs/workflow-events.jsonl"
